title: Chinese Zodiac Daily Forecast: Thursday, April 16, 2026
description: Top Luck: Snake, Rat, Dragon. Handle with Care: Tiger, Rabbit, Pig. Daily zodiac forecast for all 12 Chinese zodiac signs.

title: Birth Hours & Wealth Personalities: A Western-Friendly Guide
description: This guide uses the ancient "12 Earthly Branches" to reveal your innate "Wealth Archetype"—the personality strengths that shape how you earn and manage money, not a fixed fate.​

title: What Is BaZi? A Beginner's Guide to Chinese Astrology & Numerology
description: What is BaZi? Learn the fundamentals of the Four Pillars of Destiny — the ancient Chinese astrology system that maps your Five Elements birth chart. Understand Heavenly Stems, Earthly Branches, the Day Master, and how BaZi reveals your personality, career, and life path.

title: Benevolence, Righteousness, Propriety, Wisdom, and Integrity
description: The foundational code of China's five-millennium civilization is encoded within the dynamic interplay of Benevolence, Righteousness, Propriety, Wisdom, Integrity and the Five Elements.

title: How to Read Your BaZi Chart: A Step-by-Step Guide
description: Learn how to read and interpret your BaZi (Four Pillars of Destiny) chart step by step. Understand the Heavenly Stems, Earthly Branches, Five Elements, and Ten Gods in your birth chart.
